contracts.title: Contracts

empty.subtitle: Create a P2P contract with any community member

create.title: Create Contract
create.arbiter_hint: Optional: Choose an arbiter for dispute resolution if needed
create.items_hint: Items will be auto-deactivated when contract is completed
create.file_hint: File contents never leave your device. Only SHA256 hash is stored on server.
create.no_partners_hint: You need at least one partner to create a contract.
create.write_hint: Your text is hashed client-side. A copy will be downloaded for your records when you sign.

sign_modal.title: Sign Contract
sign_modal.verify_hint: Upload your copy of the contract file to verify its SHA256 hash matches
sign_modal.hash_mismatch_warning: WARNING: File hashes do not match! This is NOT the same file. Do not sign!

verify.mismatch: File verification failed! Hashes do not match.

complete_modal.title: Complete Contract & Leave Review
complete_modal.review_placeholder: How was working with this partner?

confirm.cancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this contract?
confirm.reject: Are you sure you want to reject this contract?
confirm.escalate: Are you sure you want to escalate the arbitration to the next level? This cannot be undone.

errors.no_pgp_keys: You must generate PGP keys first (Profile -> Security)

arbitration.confirm_initiate: Are you sure you want to initiate arbitration? This will create a Matrix room with the arbiter.

verdict.title: Verdict
verdict.summary_placeholder: Explain the reasoning behind your verdict...

clause.title: Arbitration Clause
clause.legal_note: Portuguese version is legally binding. Other languages are informational.

templates.service_body:
Service Agreement

Provider: [Name]

Client: [Name]

Services: [Describe the service to be provided]

Compensation: [Amount and currency]

Timeline: [Start date] to [End date]

Terms:

  • Payment due upon completion unless otherwise agreed
  • Either party may cancel with 7 days written notice
templates.sale_body:
Sale Agreement

Seller: [Name]

Buyer: [Name]

Item: [Description of item being sold]

Price: [Amount and currency]

Condition: [New/Used — describe condition]

Delivery: [Method and date]

Terms:

  • Seller confirms ownership and right to sell
  • Buyer confirms inspection and acceptance upon delivery
templates.rental_body:
Rental Agreement

Owner: [Name]

Tenant: [Name]

Property/Item: [Description]

Rental period: [Start date] to [End date]

Rent: [Amount and currency per month/week]

Deposit: [Amount, refundable upon return in good condition]

Terms:

  • Tenant responsible for maintaining good condition
  • Notice period for termination: [N] days
templates.loan_body:
Loan Agreement

Lender: [Name]

Borrower: [Name]

Amount: [Amount and currency]

Repayment date: [Date]

Interest: [Rate or 'None']

Terms:

  • Borrower agrees to repay in full by the date above
  • Late payment: [Penalty terms or 'None']

contracts.landing_meta: Peer-to-peer contracts with PGP signing, SHA256 verification and built-in arbitration. Free and open-source.
contracts.landing_hero_title: Digital contracts — cryptographic signing and arbitration
contracts.landing_hero_subtitle: Sign contracts with PGP, verify integrity via SHA256 and resolve disputes with built-in arbitration. Court-admissible proof.
contracts.landing_problem_1: Paper contracts easy to forge and impossible to verify remotely
contracts.landing_problem_3: No accessible dispute resolution mechanism for person-to-person contracts
contracts.landing_feature_1_desc: Both parties sign with PGP keys — cryptographic non-repudiation, impossible to deny
contracts.landing_feature_2_desc: Contract file verified by SHA256 hash client-side — the server never sees the content
contracts.landing_feature_3_desc: Timestamp anchored to Bitcoin blockchain via OpenTimestamps — immutable proof of when it was signed
contracts.landing_feature_4_desc: 3 tiers: P2P (UNCITRAL), institutional (CAC Lisbon) or court — fair dispute resolution
contracts.landing_feature_5_desc: The server stores only the hash, never the contract content. All crypto is client-side
contracts.landing_feature_6_desc: Open-source, no per-signature fees, no ads. Civic infrastructure, not a product
contracts.landing_how_1: Upload the file and sign with your PGP key
contracts.landing_how_2: Your partner verifies the SHA256 hash, downloads and signs with their key
contracts.landing_how_3: Both confirm completion — in case of dispute, escalate to arbitration
contracts.landing_free_desc: Signing contracts should not cost money. Parahub offers free cryptographic proof admissible in court.
